title: Add Tasks
description: Add LaCentrale search URLs to scrape vehicle listings using the lobstr.io API

content.introduction: Add LaCentrale search or listing URLs as tasks to your squid. The scraper will extract all vehicle listings matching your search criteria from the French automotive marketplace.

urlFormat.title: URL Format
urlFormat.content:
Use LaCentrale listing URLs with your desired search filters:

`https://www.lacentrale.fr/listing?yearMin=2025`

`https://www.lacentrale.fr/listing?makesModelsCommercialNames=PEUGEOT`

Build your search on lacentrale.fr with filters (make, model, year, price, etc.) and copy the URL.

proTips.content: Apply filters on lacentrale.fr (make, model, year, price range, location) to target specific vehicle segments.
LaCentrale limits search results to 347 pages maximum per URL. Use multiple filtered searches for comprehensive coverage.
Use the `fetch_since` setting to only scrape recently added listings for monitoring new inventory.

seo.title: Add Tasks - LaCentrale Cars Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add LaCentrale search URLs to scrape French vehicle listings using the lobstr.io API.
